# TARAON GLOBAL

> Ahmedabad based agri input sourcing desk led by Rajesh Kumar Trivedi. Potassium humate shiny flakes, Glycine, and Vigora plant biostimulant supplied across India in 25 Kg packs.

TARAON GLOBAL is a trading and supplier company based at Sarkhej Sanand Cross Road, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. The company sources potassium humate shiny flakes, Glycine (99%), and Vigora plant biostimulant powder, verifies each batch, and dispatches to farmers, dealers, distributors, and fertilizer blenders across India. All products ship in a standard 25 Kgs kraft bag with a printed batch number. Direct dealing, no middle layers. For pricing or dispatch, buyers contact Rajesh Kumar Trivedi on +91 63591 63666.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Company overview, sourcing workflow, buyer segments, and founder note.
- [About](/about): TARAON GLOBAL background, leadership, Ahmedabad address, and FAQs on sourcing and packaging.
- [Applications](/applications): How potassium humate, Glycine, and Vigora are used across soil, drip, fertigation, foliar spray, and NPK blending.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and enquiry form for bulk pricing and dealer terms.

## Products

- [Super Potassium Shiny Flakes 98%](/products/super-potassium-shiny-flakes-98): 98% water soluble potassium humate flakes, 55-60% humic, 1-3% fulvic, K2O 3-5%, pH 9-10, 25 Kgs pack.
- [Super F Humate Big Shiny Flakes](/products/super-f-humate-big-shiny-flakes): Big flake grade potassium humate for dealers, distributors, and fertilizer blenders, 25 Kgs pack.
- [Glycine](/products/glycine): 99% purity Glycine, bulk amino acid used as a fertilizer synergist and natural chelator.
- [Vigora Plant Biostimulant](/products/vigora): 99% pure powder biostimulant, 0.5 to 1 gram dose, yield enhancer for cotton, wheat, rice, and vegetables.
